message: 鬲丨丿賷孬 APK 賱廿氐賱丕丨 reCAPTCHA 丿丕禺賱 Android WebView 毓賳丿 鬲爻噩賷賱 丕賱丿禺賵賱 亘賰賵丿 SMS.
notes: 廿氐賱丕丨 reCAPTCHA 丿丕禺賱 丕賱鬲胤亘賷賯.
releaseNotes: Native WebView compatibility for Firebase Phone Auth reCAPTCHA: enable JavaScript windows, mixed content, first-party/third-party cookies.
title: 鬲丨丿賷孬 丨爻丕亘賷 丕賱鬲噩丕乇賷 1.0.118
